task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/timeline-overrides.css` to remove obsolete `.timeline-editor-*` rules from the old library and keep only the drag/drop affordances still used by the custom canvas. The external drag-over glow, cross-track ghost, and drop-indicator classes remain intact. The `drop-target-new-track::after` pseudo-element was retargeted from `.timeline-editor-edit-area` to `.timeline-canvas-edit-area`, with `pointer-events: none` preserved for overlay safety. No extra TimelineCanvas/TimeRuler CSS was required beyond this retargeting because the new shell is styled via Tailwind. Verification: `rg` shows no remaining `.timeline-editor-*` selectors in `timeline-overrides.css`, and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` exits 0.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The override sheet now only targets selectors still present in the custom editor flow: cross-track ghost, drop indicators, drag-over glow, and the `drop-target-new-track` pseudo-element on `.timeline-canvas-edit-area`. No legacy `.timeline-editor-*` selectors remain in `timeline-overrides.css`. This batch was verified by selector inspection and compile-time checks; final runtime rendering confirmation of those affordances remains part of T9.
